content.en:
"Master, the rookie king quest is about to begin, please enter the illusory world!"

Ziya reminded Ye Tian.

"Got it!"

Ye Tian nodded.

The rookie king quest is carried out in the illusory world, and the highness who participates in this rookie king quest will enter the illusory world, and will be arranged to enter the same unreal quest world for a fighting battle, and the person who fights to the end is the rookie king, and you can get the reward of the rookie king.

Of course, the more people you beat, the better the rewards.

Swish!

Ye Tian entered the illusory world, and was soon arranged by the illusory world to enter the rookie king quest world.

This time, the 103 new highnesses basically participated in this mission, after all, there is no punishment for this mission, even if it fails, it doesn't matter, if you are lucky enough to defeat a few highnesses, even if you are ranked lower, you can get a lot of rewards.

It can be said that this rookie king mission is completely a benefit, if you don't participate, it will be completely stupid!

As a result, the 103 newly promoted Highnesses were all involved.

These 103 Highnesses have been cultivating in the Supreme Hall of the Human Race for 10 years, and no one knows what the strength of the others is.

This is not only a rookie king mission, but also an opportunity for them to witness the strength of other highnesses.

Whoa!!

A famous highness entered this illusory mission world, and soon all 103 highnesses arrived and scattered all over the mission world.

At this moment, a voice sounded in the darkness.

"The rookie king mission has officially begun, your highnesses, please look at your left wrist, there is a watch on it, through this watch, you can sense the position of other highnesses. "

Ye Tian lowered his head and looked at his left wrist.

I saw a golden watch suddenly appear on my left wrist, and there was a virtual screen on the watch, and there were red dots in it.

These red dots represent a famous Highness, and each of them is inside.

In this way, no highness wants to hide himself, if he wants to survive to the end, he must go through one battle after another, and it is almost impossible to get a good ranking by luck.

"There's a Highness nearby!"

Ye Tian confirmed through his watch.

Immediately, he flew towards this Highness, and this Highness also seemed to fly towards Ye Tian.

In the blink of an eye, the two met.

"It's him!"

His Highness recognized Ye Tian and immediately became excited.

He knew that Ye Tian was the one who had chosen the strongest Supreme Divine Codex in the first place.

And that strongest supreme divine canon, not only is it difficult to cultivate, but no one has succeeded in cultivating for many years.

He felt that Ye Tian had not succeeded in cultivating in just 10 years, and his strength had definitely not increased much.

And he had already cultivated an ordinary divine canon to the entry level, and his strength had reached the second-grade ordinary level of the Son of the Universe combat power, which was very close to the first-grade ordinary level of the Son of the Universe combat power, which should be enough to defeat Ye Tian.

"You're going to lose!"

His Highness rushed over.

Ye Tian just glanced at the other party lightly, and immediately slashed over with a Heartless Divine Sword Technique.

Burst!

A knife penetrated the body and directly killed the opponent in seconds.

Yellow-level area, a certain cultivation tower.

His Royal Highness Ming Ao, the new highness, found himself in the cultivation room in a blink of an eye, and he was stunned.

"I ...... Wasn't I fighting that Highness in the mission world!......

He couldn't believe it, but he had to admit that he was killed by the other party, so he withdrew from the mission world.

"Who the hell is that guy, how can you be so powerful!!

He didn't know Ye Tian, after all, everyone was cultivating during this period of time, and every His Highness didn't want to waste a moment of time.

Therefore, there was not much communication between these new highnesses, except for the time when the Divine Ceremony was held, he had never seen Ye Tian, so naturally he didn't know Ye Tian.

"Hey, I didn't expect me to be so weak!"

His Royal Highness was deeply shocked by the thought.

......

Quest World.

Ye Tian easily killed His Highness Ming Ao in seconds and continued to look for other Highnesses.

All His Highnesses who were found by Ye Tian were almost killed by him one by one.

Moreover, Ye Tian has an arcane-level spatial talent, how fast his speed is, and the speed at which he kills people is also fast.

In a short period of time, 10 His Highnesses were eliminated by Ye Tian.

In the quest world, the number of His Highnesses is getting smaller and smaller.

Ye Tian killed 20 His Highnesses, and when he went to look at his watch again, he found that there were only seven or eight red dots in the virtual screen of the watch, which meant that there were only seven or eight His Highnesses left.

Soon, Ye Tian met another His Highness.

This highness was dressed in a bronze god costume and held a bronze artifact gun.

"Under the Bronze Highness!"

His Royal Highness Bronze introduced himself.

"My name is His Highness Wanfa!" Ye Tian said lightly.

His Royal Highness Bronze seemed to be very confident, and pointed a shot at Ye Tian: "Your Highness Wanfa, admit defeat, you may not know, I have officially stepped into the peak level of the Son of the Universe not long ago, you can't beat me!"

"You can take me and talk again!"

Ye Tian didn't spare his hand at all, and used all his strength to use the Heartless Divine Sword Technique.

After the slash, His Royal Highness Bronze froze, and the whole person stood in the void, like a stone statue.

The next moment, His Bronze Highness's body collapsed!

Although he is a peak-level son of the universe, he is only the third grade, Ye Tiannai is the first grade, and the gap between the strength of the two is too big.

For Ye Tian, His Royal Highness Bronze is undoubtedly a powerful ant.

The next few highnesses are all peak-level children of the universe, but they are undoubtedly at the third level.

When Ye Tian met them, they were still fighting with each other.

In the end, Ye Tian eliminated them all and swept the audience.

"No one anymore!"

Ye Tian looked at the watch, there was only one red dot on it, representing himself.

There is no doubt that all the other highnesses are eliminated.

"Congratulations to His Highness Wanfa for becoming the new king!"

The Unreal World ushered in a congratulatory voice.

At the same time, all the highnesses in the entire yellow-level region received the results of this rookie king mission.

In the blink of an eye, Ye Tian's reputation resounded throughout the yellow-level region.

......

A certain cultivation tower.

His Highness the White Bone looked at the results of the rookie king's mission sent by the illusory world, and the big characters of His Highness Wanfa were very conspicuous.

"He's become the king of newcomers!"

His Highness the White Bone was very surprised.

At the beginning, Ye Tian had to choose the supreme divine canon, he thought that Ye Tian was going to fall silent, and he persuaded Ye Tian at that time.

Unexpectedly, Ye Tian became the rookie king in a blink of an eye, crushing all the new highnesses.

What an honor!!

And in the rookie king quest world, he only killed one of his highnesses by luck, and was eliminated by another powerful highness.

In comparison, he was too different from Ye Tian.

"When His Highness Wanfa was in the domain, he was the first, but he didn't expect to enter the big stage of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, he was still the first, I'm afraid that the military lord also looked down on His Highness Wanfa from afar!"

Soon, the rewards of the rookie king task were distributed one by one.

Although the other Highnesses did not receive the title of Rookie King, as long as they defeated a Highness in the Rookie King Quest World, they could get some rewards.

Most of the rewards are points, but there are also rewards for some cultivation resources or inheritance of secret arts.

As for how to choose the reward, it is up to your Highnesses to choose their own choice.

Ye Tian was also rewarded at this time.

His rewards are huge, but there are also multiple options.

Among them, there are 1000 points for the point reward, and this reward is definitely there.

The next reward is a medium-grade artifact, a supernatural power inheritance, a Heavenly Dao script, and a large number of cultivation resources.

These cultivation resources can be exchanged for points, and if they are exchanged for points, you can get 3,000 points.

Medium-grade artifacts, supernatural inheritance, and Heavenly Dao characters can be selected arbitrarily, but Heavenly Dao characters cannot be selected to some more precious Heavenly Dao characters.

For example, the word "time" that represents time and the word "space" that represents space, these two Heavenly Dao characters are undoubtedly the most precious Heavenly Dao characters among all the Heavenly Dao characters.

Let's not talk about whether the Supreme Hall of the Human Race has these two Heavenly Dao characters? Even if there were, it would certainly not be possible to bestow them on His Highness.

If it is given to a highness, once this highness falls, it means that the human race has lost this heavenly dao script.

Every Heavenly Dao text is very precious, and even some Heavenly Dao words were exchanged for the lives of the ancestors of the human race, so naturally they cannot be wasted casually.

Ye Tian thought about it for a while, and then began to choose the reward method.

"Most of those cultivation resources are useless to me, so let's exchange them for points, so that I can have an extra 4,000 points. If you have a medium-grade artifact, choose a space artifact, a medium-grade knife weapon can also be bought at a high price, but a medium-grade artifact is difficult to buy, once you get a medium-grade artifact, it will help my strength to a certain extent. As for the supernatural inheritance, the general supernatural inheritance is useless to me, but the spatial supernatural power is very useful to me, and the benefits are maximized, so I choose the spatial supernatural power. "

After Ye Tian made his choice, he reported his choice.

Then, he waited quietly for the reward to arrive.

First of all, the points will arrive quickly!

About half an hour later, an illusory elf came to Ye Tian's cultivation tower.

The reward is here!
